chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D- 2289 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case 19.08.2025 Mr. Ali Asadullah Bullo advocate for the petitioner Mr. Khurram Rashid advocate for CAA -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. The petitioner is aggrieved by the dismissal order dated 22.12.2021 and appellate order dated 04.03.2022, both passed by CAA. Learned counsel for the petitioner claims that certain procedural irregularities were committed during the course of enquiry. Learned counsel for the petitioner would be satisfied if dismissal order dated 22.12.2021 and appellate order dated 04.03.2022 are set aside and this petition is remanded to the CAA, for a de-novo enquiry, to be conducted strictly in accordance with law. Learned counsel for CAA has no objection to such proposition. Order accordingly. The Director General CAA is directed to carry out a de-novo enquiry, concerning the petitioner’s alleged misconduct, strictly in accordance with law and complete it within 03 months from the date of this order, after affording an opportunity of personal hearing to the petitioner, through a speaking order. Copy of this order shall be sent to Director General, CAA for compliance. Instant petition is disposed of in the above terms along with all pending applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Wasim PS
